articles.title: Jayson Tatum set to return vs. Wizards after injury management off-day
articles.description:
Tatum had missed Thursday’s game against the Thunder, his first absence since making his season debut on March 6.

The post Jayson Tatum set to return vs. Wizards after injury management off-day appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jayson Tatum returns to play against the Wizards after missing one game.

His return boosts Celtics' chances for local fans ahead of upcoming games.
